rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §39.0234 governs electronic administration of school assessment instruments; it is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Each assessment instrument required under Section 39.023(a), (c), or (l) must be administered electronically, unless otherwise provided by commissioner rule.
_note: Rule text concerns electronic testing administration; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation or school finance funding formulas.
